headline: Palo Alto Networks MWC Deals Tie AI Security Story To Valuation Gap
summary: Palo Alto Networks (NasdaqGS:PANW) announced new partnerships at Mobile World Congress 2026. The company is working with Nokia, U Mobile, Aeris, and Celerway to secure AI Factories, 5G, and IoT networks. The collaborations focus on data sovereignty, proactive threat protection, and zero trust at the edge. Palo Alto Networks, best known for its cybersecurity platforms and services, is tying its core offerings more tightly to AI data centers, 5G, and IoT infrastructure. By teaming up with...

headline: Is Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Pricing Reflect Its Volatile Run And Cash Flow Outlook
summary: Wondering if Palo Alto Networks is still worth the price on your screen, or if recent volatility has left it mispriced compared to its fundamentals? The stock closed at US$156.09, with a 10.2% gain over the last 7 days, an 11.8% decline over 30 days, a 13.0% decline year to date, a 15.3% decline over 1 year, but returns of 66.8% over 3 years and 173.5% over 5 years. Recent attention around Palo Alto Networks has centered on how large cybersecurity platforms fit into corporate and government...
